title: Custom Coinflip
description: The ultimate Coinflip plugin supporting 1+ built-in currencies with a tax and bet limits system
body:
**Introduction:**
- CoinFlip is an advanced plugin used for creating exciting 1v1 betting matches where players can wager money and test their luck, perfect for PvP and Practice servers.

**Server Software Support:**
- Spigot
- Paper
- Bukkit
- Folia

**Suppoprt:**
- Email at: codery.pro@gmail.com
- Our discord: https://discord.gg/tb9tv4ZwQZ

**Features:**
- Coinflip Game System - Create and join coinflip betting games
- Interactive GUI - Fully customizable YAML-based GUI system
- Custom Model Data Support - Custom textures for all GUI items
- Multi-Currency System - Supports Vault economy AND PlayerPoints
- Tax System - Configurable tax on winnings
- Bonus Points - Reward system for winners
- Anti-Item Theft - Triple-layer protection with NBT marking and custom inventory holder
- Player Statistics - Track wins, losses, earnings
- Folia Compatible - Works on Folia servers
- Hex Color Support - Full RGB color support in messages
- Sound Effects - Customizable sounds for all actions

**Commands:**
- /cf - Open coinflip browser GUI
- /cf <amount> heads - Create heads coinflip
- /cf <amount> tails - Create tails coinflip
- /cf delete - Delete your active game
- /cf reload - Reload configurations (Admin)
- /cf help - Show help menu
- Aliases: /coinflip
